payload.answer: This looks like a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event, not a new distinct memory. No memory has been committed.
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
repair_options: Treat the repeated Slack event as a duplicate and do not create an additional memory.
If these were actually two distinct events despite sharing the same Slack event ID, review the source metadata before deciding whether to add a separate memory.
